dataHeroPensiones.title: Pension Solutions
dataHeroPensiones.description: Our software <bold>is designed for pension funds, insurance companies, and financial institutions seeking to transform their management.</bold> With our platforms, you can manage severance pay, mandatory and voluntary pensions, and annuity settlements with full traceability, efficiency, and regulatory compliance.

manage it with our software
titlePensiones1.description: The pension system in Latin America is undergoing transformations that require <bold>vision and technology:</bold>

titlePensiones2.description: With our pension solutions, you get scalable and secure software, aligned with regulations and designed to ensure trust and sustainability.

titlePensiones3.title:
A unique, modular, and scalable

pension platform
titlePensiones3.description:
Our pension software centralizes the administration of the pension system in a single technological core, from which it is possible to manage mandatory pensions, voluntary pensions, severance pay, and life annuities in an integrated way.



Its modular and parameterizable design allows it to adapt to the regulations of each country in LATAM, handle high operational volumes, and ensure traceability, control, and consistency of information throughout the entire pension cycle.

cardsPensiones2.bottomText: With our pension solutions, you get scalable and secure software, aligned with regulations and designed to ensure trust and sustainability.

cardPensiones3.title: Mandatory Pensions Module
cardPensiones3.description: Manage the complete affiliate cycle, from design and affiliation to recognition and pension payment, <bold>under different regimes and regulatory frameworks.</bold>

items.textos: Management of affiliations, work history, and contributions
Pension settlement in capitalization, pay-as-you-go, or mixed schemes.
Management of updates, transfers, withdrawals, and status changes.
Integrated pensioner payroll, with mass processes and total control.
Regulatory parameterization by country and continuous updates in response to regulatory changes.
Integration with regulatory, accounting, and collection systems.
Generation of executive and detailed reports
Designed with the user experience in mind for ease of use.
360° view of affiliates and employers, providing unified access to bank accounts, relationships, and obligation status.

cardPensiones3.textoFooter: We manage <red>48%</red> of mandatory pensions in Colombia, representing <bold>USD 63 trillion</bold>

cardPensiones3.title: Life Annuities and Pensioner Payroll Module
cardPensiones3.description: Manage the settlement and periodic payment of life annuities and pensioner payroll from a <bold>100% web-based and highly automated platform.</bold>

items.textos: Automatic settlement of life annuities.
Management of survivorship, substitutions, and temporary benefits.
Mass processes for calculation and payment disbursement.
Notifications to pensioners about payments and adjustments.
Integrated document manager for auditing and traceability.
Electronic file, notifications, integration with document manager, upload and file generation component.
Adapts to pension funds, insurance companies, and occupational risk companies, allowing you to manage both pensioner payrolls and life annuities in one place.

cardPensiones3.btn: Learn about the life annuities module

cardPensiones3.title: Voluntary Pensions Module
cardPensiones3.description: Manage voluntary pension savings schemes from a multifund logic, flexible and oriented towards affiliate self-management, with a complete set of processes that <bold>cover financial, operational, and risk management</bold>

items.textos: Management of periodic and extraordinary contributions.
Mobility between funds according to the affiliate's risk profile.
Comprehensive management of affiliates, individuals, and accounts.
Financial management, valuation, and control of risks associated with funds.
Management of tax benefits in accordance with local regulations.
Self-management portals for affiliates and employers.
Regulatory, accounting, and collective contribution reports.
Operational and financial closing of funds with full traceability.

cardPensiones3.textoFooter: We manage <red>43%</red> of voluntary savings in Colombia, representing <bold>USD 5 trillion</bold>

cardPensiones3.title: Severance Pay Module
cardPensiones3.description: <bold>Manage the comprehensive administration of severance pay</bold> with high operational volumes and strict regulatory controls, from the same pension core, covering everything from affiliate management to fund calculation and legally permitted withdrawals.

items.textos: Management of partial and total withdrawals according to legal causes.
Mass processes for settlement, transfers, and payments.
Multifund administration with additional benefits.
Integration with payroll, collection, and accounting systems.
Reduction of operational costs and improvement in contribution traceability.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Is this a single software or several different solutions?

answer.descriptions: Our platform is integral and modular. This means that, although it operates on a single technological core, you can implement only the modules your entity needs (e.g., only Severance Pay or only Mandatory Pensions) and scale them in the future.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: What entities can use this pension software?

listsItems: Public and private Pension Fund Administrators (AFP).
Companies with their own or special pension regimes.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Does the software adapt to the regulations of each country in LATAM?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The system is highly parameterizable. We have experience in multiple LATAM countries, allowing us to configure business rules, settlement formulas, and specific regulatory reports for each jurisdiction.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Can I implement only some modules and scale later?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The modular architecture allows you to activate only the necessary modules and incorporate new ones as your operation requires, without the need to migrate or redesign.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Does the software cover pensioner payroll and mass payments?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The Life Annuities and Pensioner Payroll module allows you to settle, calculate, and disburse mass payments in an automated way, with total control and traceability.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Can it also be used to manage voluntary pension savings or APV?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The Voluntary Pensions module manages voluntary pension savings schemes with multifund logic, mobility between funds, tax benefits, and self-management portals.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Can it be used to manage severance pay from the same system?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The Severance Pay module operates on the same pension core, allowing you to manage withdrawals, mass settlements, transfers, and integration with payroll and accounting.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Is the software multi-country and multi-currency?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The platform is designed to operate in multiple LATAM countries with regulatory parameterization by jurisdiction and multi-currency support.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: What kind of support does Heinsohn offer?

answer.descriptions: We offer comprehensive support: from initial consulting and implementation to daily operational support, backed by a team of more than 200 professionals specialized in the pension sector.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: How to start implementing the pension software?

answer.descriptions: You can schedule a session with our team of experts to assess your needs, define the project scope, and plan the implementation step by step.
